message:
feat(e2e): comprehensive test infrastructure improvements

E2E Library (tests/e2e/lib/):
- logging.sh: Major expansion with structured logging support, log levels,
  timestamps, file rotation, and JSON output capabilities
- pty.sh: Improved PTY handling for more reliable terminal simulation

E2E Scripts (tests/e2e/scripts/):
- test_golden_resize.sh: Enhanced resize testing scenarios
- test_layout_composer_resize.sh: Layout-specific resize tests
- test_virtualized_search.sh: Virtualized list search testing

Top-level Scripts:
- a11y_transitions_e2e.sh: Accessibility transition testing
- command_palette_e2e.sh: Command palette E2E coverage
- demo_showcase_e2e.sh: Demo showcase tour automation
- e2e/capability_sim/run_capability_sim_e2e.sh: Terminal capability simulation
- e2e/modal_dialog/run_modal_dialog_e2e.sh: Modal dialog testing
- e2e/run_all.sh: Master test runner improvements
- e2e/state_persistence/test_state_persistence.sh: State save/restore testing
- e2e_demo_tour.sh: Interactive demo tour
- e2e_test.sh: Core E2E test runner updates
- hover_stabilizer_e2e.sh: Hover state stabilization tests
- widget_api_e2e.sh: Widget API contract testing

These improvements provide a more robust foundation for automated testing
and CI integration.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

+    fi

+    return 1
